CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)

answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780. (DAG/301/EH)
